message.content:
@startuml
participant "张三" as ZhangSan
participant "李四" as LiSi

alt [借钱案例]
  ZhangSan -> LiSi: 我要借钱
  loop [循环借钱100次]
    group 成功案例
      LiSi --> ZhangSan: 借给你
    end
    ZhangSan -> LiSi: 我要还钱
    LiSi --> ZhangSan: 收到欠款
  end
else [借钱失败]
  ZhangSan -> LiSi: 我还要借钱
  LiSi --> ZhangSan: 不借了
end
@enduml
